_comment: IAM inline policy for the EC2 instance role that runs the VAR KMS proxy.
This policy grants the minimum permissions required for the proxy:
- kms:Encrypt / kms:GenerateDataKey: wrap the enclave DEK on first seal
- kms:Decrypt: unwrap the DEK on resume (further restricted by PCR0
attestation condition in the key policy — see kms-key-policy.json)
- kms:DescribeKey: read key metadata for health checks
Replace KEY_ARN with the full ARN of your CMK.
